Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Enables workflow tracing when true; should be set to false outside of debugging scenarios.

Variable.name: transient
Variable.Description: Static variable; means that when the user clicks Cancel, the WorkflowCase disappears and no work item is created for the launcher at all; should be set to true.

Variable.name: requestedAction
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; ends up populated by initial form response.

Variable.name: identityName
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; ends up populated by initial form response.

Variable.name: plan
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; populated during the Build Plan step using the buildMailLicensingPlan(identityName, samAccountName, requestedAction) method from Rule-Ascension-EmailAddress-RuleLibrary.

Variable.name: approvalSet
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; populated upon subprocess generation of the approvalSet.

Variable.name: fallbackApprover
Variable.Description: Identity or Workgroup assigned nested approvals when there is an issue assigning to an expected target.

Variable.name: isUsersManager
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; Boolean formed using contextIsUsersManager(String identityName) method from Rule-Ascension-EmailAddress-RuleLibrary.

Variable.name: isUsersContractorManager
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; Boolean formed using contextIsUsersContractorManager(String identityName) method from Rule-Ascension-EmailAddress-RuleLibrary.

Variable.name: isUsersTrustedRequester
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; Boolean formed using contextIsTrustedRequester(String identityName) method from Rule-Ascension-EmailAddress-RuleLibrary.

Variable.name: identityEmail
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; populated during Update WorkflowContext step; reflects the email attribute of the target Identity.

Variable.name: identityDisplayName
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; populated during Update WorkflowContext step; reflects the displayName attribute of the target Identity.

Variable.name: workItemComments
Variable.Description: Not currently used by this workflow, but included to ensure expected subprocess behaviors.

Variable.name: violationReviewDecision
Variable.Description: Not currently used by this workflow, but included to ensure expected subprocess behaviors.

Variable.name: project
Variable.Description: Not currently used by this workflow, but included to ensure expected subprocess behaviors.

Variable.name: policyViolations
Variable.Description: Not currently used by this workflow, but included to ensure expected subprocess behaviors.

Variable.name: identityRequestId
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; populated upon subprocess generation of the identityRequestId.

Variable.name: lastApprovalState
Variable.Description: OOTB control variable; used in this workflow for conditional behaviors of related EmailTemplate (see managerEmailTemplate).

Variable.name: managerEmailTemplate
Variable.Description: Static variable; should be set to Ascension-EmailTemplate-MailboxLicensingNotification.

Variable.name: identityLN
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; populated during Update WorkflowContext step; reflects the lastName attribute of the target Identity.

Variable.name: identityFN
Variable.Description: Placeholder variable; populated during Update WorkflowContext step; reflects the firstName attribute of the target Identity.

Variable.name: httpSession
Variable.Description: httpSession

Step.name: Determine Action

Field.helpKey: Please select the action you would like to preform against the user's email account. If the only mailbox action listed is Revoke License, the selected Identity already has a mailbox license.
Field.name: requestedAction

Step.Description: Initial form for mailbox licensing update requests

Step.name: Update WorkflowContext
Step.Description: Sets various global variables for use in later workflow steps

Step.name: Build Plan
Step.Description: Complies a provisioning plan using the buildMailLicensingPlan(identityName, samAccountName, requestedAction) method from Rule-Ascension-EmailAddress-RuleLibrary

Step.name: Approval

Approval.name: Contractor Mailbox Licensing Approval
Approval.send: isUsersManager, isUsersContractorManager, isUsersTrustedRequester, identityDisplayName, identityEmail, identityName, requestedAction, identityFN, identityLN, managerEmailTemplate, fallbackApprover

Step.Description: Follow up form for handling approvals (when launcher is not user's manager); or confirmation (when launcher is user's manager)

Step.name: Provision
Step.Description: Provisions the supplied plan; approvalScheme argument must be set to none for this step to function as intended in this workflow.

Step.name: Handle Rejection
Step.Description: Cleans up the identityRequest object in cases where a rejection has occurred.

Step.name: Confirm Launcher Submission
Step.Description: Displays a FacesMessage upon initial form submission when the launcher of the workflow was not the manager of the target user. Informs them that an approval will be opened.

Step.name: Notify Requester
Step.Description: Notifies the original launcher of the workflow in cases where the launcher was not the manager of the target identity.

Step.name: Notify Manager
Step.Description: Notifies the manager of the target identity following approval or rejection.
